notes: Each of the 3 runs is a DISTINCT stored LLM output (backtest/agent_runs/), so mean/range reflects real run-to-run output differences. CAVEAT (honest, per phase2 §5's intent): runs executed within one Claude Code session share conversational context and are CORRELATED, so this range UNDERSTATES true fresh-session variance -- treat it as a lower bound until runs from independent sessions exist. vs_baselines/verdict remain null here; the CI comparison lives in backtest/scorecards/bootstrap_ci_*.json per D-013's standing precedent.
